violations.description: Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Uncleaned dough totes stored in back storage hallway. Food debris in reach in prep table cooler and needs cleaning.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Pizza peels stored on floor in back storage hallway. Grill cleaning brushes stored on stand 1" off floor and on floor. Recommend storing elevated or on shelving unit below oven. Drawer use to store pizza cutters near pizza oven has a build up of debris and is in need of cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling in public restroom has "splatter" and needs cleaning. Floors under pizza oven and equipment have food debris and need cleaning.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. Chemical bottles stored with single use food service gloves in back hallway storage area.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. Upright single door cooler used to store artichoke spinach and buffalo dips not keeping food items at proper temperatures.

Reheating food. — --Commercially processed, properly packaged ready-to-eat food was not heated to a minimum temperature of 140F for hot holding. Establishment uses steam table to re-heat cheese and alfredo sauces. Ensure proper re-heating temperatures are achieved within one hour.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food prepared and packaged by a processing plant was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days after original package was opened. Chorizo dated 12/15.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food was not consumed/discarded within 10 calendar days from the date of preparation. Mac N Cheese dated 12/5.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Reach in prep table cooler has a build-up of food debris and needs cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Ceiling/walls near HVAC vents need cleaning. Floor has build-up of food debris and needs cleaning around dish machine.
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Cooking and reheating to the proper time and temperature (5 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
